REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF MICHELE ALESANDRO'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER TO PRECLUDE TAKING THE DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFFS MINOR CHILDREN AND MOTION TO QUASH. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. THE HEARING DATE WAS REQUESTED PRIOR TO THE MOTION CUT-OFF AND CALENDARED BY THE COURT. BASED ON EVIDENCE PROVIDED AND REPRESENTATIONS MADE BY PLAINTIFF'S CHILDREN SHALL NOT BE DEPOSED AND SHALL NOT TESTIFY AT TRIAL. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ANNE CHRISTINE MASSULLO, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion For Protective Order To Preclude Taking The Deposition Of Plaintiffs Minor Children And Motion To Quash
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MICHELE ALESANDRO'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER TO PRECLUDE TAKING THE DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFFS MINOR CHILDREN AND MOTION TO QUASH.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. The hearing date was requested prior to the motion cut-off and calendared by the Court. Based on evidence provided and representations made by Plaintiff's children shall not be deposed and shall not testify at trial. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Anne Christine Massullo, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/ACM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2017 Set For Trial On Apr-23-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
